title: Munch & Crunch Stainless Steel Dog Bowl | 700ml Capacity for Small & Medium Dogs & Cats with Anti Slip Base (700ml Pet Bowl)
features: GENEROUS 700ML CAPACITY: With a 700ml capacity, this bowl is ideal for small and medium dogs, accommodating enough dog food or water for an entire meal or day. It’s a practical choice for mealtime at home or while travelling.

DURABLE STAINLESS STEEL CONSTRUCTION: This dog bowl is made from high-quality stainless steel, ensuring durability and resistance to rust or damage. It's perfect for long-term use, making it an essential addition to any dog owner’s collection of dog stuff.

SUITABLE FOR FOOD OR WATER: Designed to handle both meals and hydration, this bowl serves as a reliable dog food bowl or dog water bowl. Whether you’re feeding wet food, kibble, or offering fresh water, it’s the only bowl you’ll need.

LIGHTWEIGHT & PORTABLE: The lightweight design ensures this dog bowl is easy to carry, making it a great companion for travel or outdoor adventures. It’s ideal for taking to the park, on holiday, or during road trips.
ANTI SLIP RUBBER BASE: Fitted with a rubber rim, this bowl stays in place during use. Your dog can enjoy their meals without the bowl sliding around, even on smooth surfaces.

STYLISH & PRACTICAL DESIGN: Combining a sleek, polished look with functional features, this bowl enhances any feeding area. Its modern design makes it a perfect addition to your collection of dog accessories.
EASY TO CLEAN & HYGIENIC: The stainless steel surface is easy to clean, ensuring hygiene with every use. Handwash for best results.

PERFECT FOR SMALL & MEDIUM DOGS: Specifically designed for small and medium dogs, this bowl offers the perfect size for your pet's needs. Whether it’s a Chihuahua or a Beagle, this is a reliable choice for all mealtimes.
GREAT GIFT FOR DOG LOVERS: Searching for thoughtful gifts for dogs? This bowl is an excellent option, whether for new pet owners or as a practical dog Christmas gift for furry friends.

ESSENTIAL DOG ACCESSORY FOR EVERYDAY USE: Whether you’re updating your pet’s gear or starting fresh, this dog bowl is an essential item. Its combination of quality and convenience ensures mealtimes are always stress-free.
description: Product Description The Munch & Crunch Dog Bowl is a practical and stylish solution for feeding your furry companion. Designed with a 700ml capacity, this dog bowl is the perfect size for small and medium dogs, whether they’re enjoying their favourite kibble, wet food, or staying hydrated with fresh water. Made from durable stainless steel, it’s built to last and withstand everyday use, making it an essential addition to your collection of dog accessories. The bowl’s lightweight design makes it easy to use at home or on the go, while its anti-slip rubber base keeps it securely in place during mealtime, preventing spills and messes. Whether you’re shopping for everyday, looking for thoughtful gifts for dogs, or even dog Christmas gifts, this versatile and reliable dog bowl is sure to impress both pets and owners alike. Directions Clean regularly
